description: Backend Developer building performant web applications and developer tools.

hero.title: Backend / Golang Developer
hero.p1: I am a Backend Developer based in Indonesia 🇮🇩 with 2.5+ years of experience building scalable, high-concurrency systems in Go—specifically for core banking and fintech.
hero.p2: I specialize in Microservices, gRPC, and Observability stacks. I focus on engineering reliable API architectures, seamless database migrations, and high-performance system monitoring.
hero.p3: Open for freelance and remote opportunities worldwide — feel free to reach out!
